author: Xu Wang
description: Create local, token-free context maps that help AI agents navigate your Obsidian vault. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Xu Wang
manifest.description: Create local, token-free context maps that help AI agents navigate your vault.
manifest.name: Local Agent Context

name: Local Agent Context

releases.author: xwang0176
releases.description:
Initial beta release of Obsidian Agent Context.

This release includes:

Vault-level agent context indexing
Folder-level agent context indexing
Local-first, token-free index generation
Safe AGENTS.md pointer creation
Markdown, JSON, and CSV context outputs for agent workflows
This is an early MVP release for testing.
releases.name: 0.1.1 - Initial beta
